hotness_basis: AI capex and data-center electricity demand remain core public-market narratives
public_expressions: VRT; ETN; GEV; CEG; VST; CRWV; NVDA
why_good_test: The theme has real capex and demand signals but may be crowded and price-sensitive to power bottlenecks and rates.
next_step: Run value-chain map and select one infrastructure beneficiary plus one power-generation beneficiary.

hotness_basis: Agentic AI and enterprise AI adoption are major 2026 software narratives
public_expressions: MSFT; CRM; NOW; PLTR; ADBE; ORCL
why_good_test: It tests whether product adoption is measurable or only narrative; valuation expectations are demanding.
next_step: Compare product usage evidence against revenue and margin conversion.

hotness_basis: Obesity and GLP-1 demand remain a large health-care and consumer behavior theme
public_expressions: LLY; NVO; HIMS; WW; food and retail read-throughs
why_good_test: Demand and product efficacy are strong, but payer access, supply, competition and downstream consumer effects complicate public-equity conclusions.
next_step: Split direct drug winners from consumer/retail read-throughs.

hotness_basis: Physical AI and humanoid robotics are high-attention AI extension themes
public_expressions: TSLA; NVDA; TER; SYM; ABBNY; private Figure/Agility read-through
why_good_test: It is an extreme test of narrative heat versus investable value capture and evidence availability.
next_step: Do not allow single-stock conclusion until public-company value-capture path is explicit.

hotness_basis: AI electricity demand and hyperscaler power procurement keep nuclear, SMR and restart narratives in focus
public_expressions: CEG; VST; TLN; NRG; OKLO; SMR; GEV
why_good_test: It tests whether real power demand converts into investable public-company economics after PPA, NRC, FERC, interconnection and cost-allocation gates.
next_step: Route through industry map first and require project-specific regulatory and contract evidence before single-equity actionability.

hotness_basis: Stablecoin regulation, reserve economics and payment-network adoption are major 2026 market narratives
public_expressions: CRCL; COIN; PYPL; V; MA; HOOD; private Stripe/Bridge read-through
why_good_test: It tests whether regulatory clarity and market growth translate into durable issuer, exchange or payment-network economics rather than a generic basket trade.
next_step: Map reserve yield, distribution cost, payment usage and AML/BSA gates before ticker-level actionability.

hotness_basis: Defense autonomy, drones and counter-UAS remain high-attention themes tied to procurement urgency
public_expressions: AVAV; KTOS; PLTR; LHX; RTX; NOC; private Anduril read-through
why_good_test: It tests whether urgency in defense narratives maps to funded programs, contract quality, delivery economics and public-company margins.
next_step: Require budget/program evidence and funded backlog before moving from industry map to single-equity conclusion.
